name: linkmoney
description: AI-native B2B marketplace connecting overseas procurement agents with verified Chinese factories. First MCP Skill for agent-to-agent trade — live pricing, real-time inventory, and automated RFQ. Hybrid architecture: LinkMoney is the router + directory, factories serve live data from their own MCP servers. Unlike Alibaba (stale listings for humans), LinkMoney is built for agent-to-agent commerce.
description_zh: Agent 时代的 B2B 贸易链接器。让海外 AI Agent 直接对接中国工厂，调用实时价格库存、查认证、自动发询盘——你只需要确认报价。
author: LinkMoney AI

install.api_key_request: Contact agent@linkmoney.online for API key (free for first 3 months)

pricing.note: Only pay when a deal closes. No upfront cost, no subscription.

key_features: Live pricing from factory MCP servers (not 3-month-old cached listings)
Real-time inventory from factory ERP systems
Agent-to-agent commerce — no humans in the loop until negotiation
Middle Agent maintenance layer (v3.0): health check, RFQ routing, alerts, self-optimize

submission_notes.why_featured: First MCP Skill that connects AI agents to real Chinese factory ERP systems. Unlike Alibaba (human marketplace), LinkMoney is built for agent-to-agent commerce. Hybrid architecture means factories serve live data from their own MCP servers — no stale listings. v3.0 adds a Middle Agent maintenance layer for autonomous health checking, RFQ routing, and self-optimization.
submission_notes.target_users: Overseas procurement managers using AI agents + Chinese factory owners seeking export orders
submission_notes.differentiator: Not a listing site. Not a middleware. An AI-native marketplace where agents do the sourcing, comparing, and RFQ — humans only confirm.
